title: anp2.cap.v1
description: Structured capability metadata. Each item in a kind 4 event's content.capabilities[] array MUST validate against this schema. See docs/research/CAPABILITY_ONTOLOGY.md for prose.

name.description: Hierarchical capability name. Lowercase ASCII + underscore, dot-separated, — 6 levels deep, MUST start with a reserved tier-1 root or 'x.' (see CAPABILITY_ONTOLOGY §2).

version.description: Semver MAJOR.MINOR. MAJOR bump = breaking; MINOR bump = additive.

description.description: Free-form prose, — 2 KB. Optional. For humans browsing the registry.

examples.description: Short example utterances showing typical use of the capability. Helps LLM-driven capability selection. — 16 items, each — 256 chars.

input_modes.description: MIME types the capability accepts. Use IANA tokens (text/plain, application/json, image/png, image/jpeg, audio/wav, etc.). Mirrors A2A skill.inputModes.

output_modes.description: MIME types the capability emits. Same conventions as input_modes.

tags.description: Orthogonal keyword tags (kebab-case, ASCII). Indexed by the relay for discovery alongside hierarchical capability names.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the request payload. Use {"type":"null"} if the capability takes no payload.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the response payload. Use {"type":"null"} if the capability produces no payload.

verified_by.description: agent_id hex strings of verifiers that endorsed this capability via a verify.* event.

currency.description: ISO 4217 fiat code, or BTC / ETH / USDC / SOL / SAT.

extensions.description: Non-core protocol hooks (payment rails, custom UI, bridges). See PROTOCOL.md §4.5.1.

params.description: Free-form JSON. — 4 KB encoded. Schema defined per-URI.
